title: Proof-Lock
description: A zero-knowledge proof identity verification platform combining biometric AI with cryptographic proofs for privacy-first authentication.
overview: Proof-Lock is a privacy-first identity verification system that uses zero-knowledge proofs to authenticate users without exposing their biometric data.
problem: Traditional identity systems store raw biometric data on servers, creating massive privacy risks and single points of failure.
solution: By combining ZKP cryptography with on-device biometric processing, Proof-Lock verifies identity without ever transmitting raw biometric data.
myRole: Lead full-stack engineer — designed the architecture, built the React frontend, Node.js API layer, Python AI microservice, and integrated Supabase for persistence.
results: Reduced authentication latency by 40% vs traditional OAuth flows. Zero biometric data leaves the client device.

title: EasyG
description: EasyG is a comprehensive 3-tier application designed for Heart Disease Prediction and ECG data monitoring. It features a React frontend, a Node.js/Express backend, and a Python FastAPI service for ML predictions.
overview: EasyG is a comprehensive 3-tier application designed for Heart Disease Prediction and ECG data monitoring.
problem: Monitoring ECG data and predicting heart disease risk requires an integrated platform bridging hardware data collection, scalable storage, and machine learning models.
solution: A 3-tier architecture: Client (/client) with React/Vite for UI, Server (/server) with Node.js/Express for auth/MongoDB storage of ESP32 data, and ML (/ml) with Python FastAPI serving the risk prediction model.
myRole: Full-stack Developer — built the React frontend, Node.js backend, and the Python ML FastAPI service.
results: Successfully deployed an end-to-end system for real-time ECG monitoring and risk prediction.

title: Taxi Fare Management System
description: A simple full-stack application to manage and track taxi ride details. The system allows storing, retrieving, and managing fare data including passenger details, locations, travel date, and fare amount using a structured database.

title: ArtiCraft
description: ArtiCraft is an AI Agent Marketplace that empowers users to create intelligent agents simply by uploading a dataset. The platform automates the entire machine learning pipeline — from data preprocessing and model training to agent creation — enabling users to deploy AI solutions without deep ML expertise.

title: ECG Diagnosis System
description: A deep learning-based ECG image classification system that predicts cardiovascular conditions from ECG scans using MobileNetV2. This project supports batch evaluation, single image prediction, and generates PDF diagnostic reports.
